name: Digatrade Financial Corp.
summary: Digatrade Financial Corp. operates as a financial technology services company. Its proprietary platform provides security and convenience services in various modalities, including online credit card payment system in South America. The company offers blockchain development services. The company was formerly known as Bit-X Financial Corporation and changed its name to Digatrade Financial Corp. in October 2015. Digatrade Financial Corp. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
